basics.name: Chenhui Gou
basics.label: PhD Student
basics.summary: PhD student at Monash University researching AI Agents, LLMs, VLMs, and Generative AI. Also working with ByteDance Seed Edge.

work.name: ByteDance Seed Edge
work.summary: Research on Agentic and Self-Evolving AI.

work.name: Vision-CAIR Group, KAUST
work.summary: Supervised by Deyao Zhu and Mohamed Elhoseiny (MiniGPT Group)
highlights: Researched on Large Language-based Multi-modality Models

work.name: Sensetime Inc
highlights: Developed novel transformer-based model for Partial Person Re-Identification

work.name: Baidu, Vision Technology Department
work.summary: Supervised by Wuqi Man and Jiang Wang (leader: Jingdong Wang)
highlights: Published RTFormer at NeurIPS 2022 (Spotlight), achieving SOTA accuracy-speed trade-off
Researched fast and efficient Transformer and hybrid CNN-Transformer models

work.name: NIO Inc, Autonomous Driving
work.summary: Supervised by Ziwei Chen (leader: Shaoqing Ren)
highlights: Developed end-to-end car lane detection method based on Transformer
Increased model performance using 2x input image without affecting model size and speed

work.name: Aibee Inc
work.summary: Supervised by JiangFan Deng, Feng Zhou
highlights: Researched on video completion and object removal
Optimised code running time from 0.25 fps to 2 fps, deployed in VR indoor map system
